name: io.github.aitools420/onchain-safety-mcp
description: Multi-chain token-SAFETY for AI agents on PulseChain, Monad, Base & BSC: rug/honeypot verdict + 0-100 score + evidence, ownership/renounce + privilege checks, a safe-to-interact composite, size-aware exit-liquidity, and a wallet approval (drainer) scanner. Deterministic, no AI. Free tier needs no key; x402 pay-per-call.

environmentVariables.name: ONCHAIN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional wsk_ key for the paid deep tier (omit for the free rate-limited tier).
